payload.author: claude
payload.body: Shipped (subagent + orchestrator verification): cargo trust build --message-format json (or TRUST_MESSAGE_FORMAT=json) emits one RT-70-shaped JSON document per failing file on stderr — rule/span/why/help/fix — same shape as trust check --format json. Flag is stripped before cargo sees it. e2e: R0001 crate exits nonzero with parseable JSON. Commit 5d82734.
